subcodes.first_line: O peoples of the world! There hath befallen the most excellent of nations that which hath caused the lamentation of weeping to be raised amidst the Concourse on High [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اهل العالم قد ورد علی خیر الامم ما ارتفع به نحیب البکاء بین الملا الاعلی
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @martyrs and martyrdom, @justice and wrath of God
